notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Henry Bolte scores. Darell Hernaiz to 3rd. Carlos Cortes to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Henry Bolte scores. Darell Hernaiz to 3rd. Carlos Cortes to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Athletics challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: catcher Shea Langeliers picks off Oswald Peraza at 3rd on throw to third baseman Zack Gelof.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Zack Gelof rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Zack Gelof grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Zack Gelof out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe. Henry Bolte scores. Darell Hernaiz to 3rd. Carlos Cortes to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes plunked
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes hit by pitch. Darell Hernaiz to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Shea Langeliers plunked
notableEvents.detail: Shea Langeliers hit by pitch. Colby Thomas to 2nd.
